name: Harvest
description: Time tracking, invoicing, and project management tool for teams and freelancers.

auth_methods.note: Harvest’s official developer documentation states the API supports both OAuth2 (for third-party applications) and personal access tokens (used via `Authorization: Bearer {token}` along with the required `Harvest-Account-ID` header).

credential_access.note: Official docs state that a user can create a personal access token under their Profile (linking to https://id.getharvest.com/profile), indicating self-serve credential creation via the UI.

api_surface.note: Docs describe a REST API with many resource endpoints (Time Tracking, Users, Clients, Projects, Tasks, Expenses, Invoices, Reports, etc.) and base URL https://api.harvestapp.com/v2/.

buildability.note: Public Harvest API v2 documentation exists and the official authentication documentation confirms immediate usability via OAuth2 or self-created personal access tokens.
